style_effects: Subtle heat haze rises from Mewtwo's armored joints, distorting the air with a faint blue-white shimmer. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through his metallic seams, casting sharp reflections of the environment onto his surface. Cool, metallic dust particles drift slowly in the air, catching the light like tiny prisms. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
